name: EXECUTE FILTER_PROJECT_LIMIT 1000
sql: SELECT symbol, close FROM prices_bench_1000 WHERE close > 100 LIMIT 100

name: EXECUTE AGGREGATE_GROUP_BY 1000
sql: SELECT symbol, AVG(close) AS avg_close FROM prices_bench_1000 GROUP BY symbol

name: EXECUTE ORDER_BY_LIMIT 1000
sql: SELECT symbol, close FROM prices_bench_1000 ORDER BY close DESC LIMIT 100

name: EXECUTE JOIN 1000
sql: SELECT p.symbol, p.close, f.metric FROM prices_bench_1000 AS p JOIN fundamentals_bench_1000 AS f ON p.symbol = f.symbol WHERE p.close > 100
